title: Finite Cardinality Principle Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite cardinality overlap-additivity QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay computes |A union B| = 4 for overlapping sets, while the malformed row claims the same count equals |A| + |B| = 6.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional cardinality-principle rows only when they add distinct finite-count, incidence, powerset, or Boolean function-map pressure; keep arbitrary infinite-cardinality theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay every finite set count, incidence count, and powerset count from explicit data.
Represent false finite rules with concrete counterexample evidence.
Keep the overlapping-set disjoint-additivity conflict tied to source-linked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence after finite replay computes both counts.
Keep arbitrary infinite-cardinality theorems under Lean horizon until no-sorry kernel-checked artifacts exist.
Promote additional finite UNSAT variants only after CNF/LRAT, QF_LIA, or equivalent proof-object evidence checks the same enumerations.
